properties.Landslides: 1. Landsliding - The upper part near the bridge
properties.Proposed Measures: A gabian wall has been constructed. Soil conservation methods should be adapted in the lands.

properties.Landslides: 1. Road surface erosion - Para Paha to Post Office Road
properties.Proposed Measures: Construction of a fifty-meter-long, three-meter-high concrete side wall along the right bank of the road is needed
properties.photopath: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MWS003-GIS/MWS003-GIS.github.io/main/IWWRMP/Data/EXD/200_photo/MWS_180/Road 5 Junction to Post Office Road - Bank Erosion.jpg

properties.Landslides: 1. Clearing of trees and rocks from hilly/mountainous areas - Galaudapahana
properties.Proposed Measures: A residential house is situated directly below this landslide site. However, as of 2024, the necessary assessment reports from the NBRO have not yet been obtained. Replacement is needed. Follow the recommendations of NBRO.
